metadata.description: Accurate API model IDs, pricing, and specs for 97 AI models across 19 providers. Prevents your coding agent from using outdated or hallucinated model names.

plugins.name: model-id-cheatsheet
plugins.description: Gives Claude instant access to accurate API model IDs, pricing, and specs for 99 models across 19 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, Amazon, Cohere, Perplexity, AI21, Moonshot, Zhipu, NVIDIA, Tencent, Microsoft, MiniMax, Xiaomi, Kuaishou).
